visualizer.emptyTitle: Select an algorithm from the sidebar
visualizer.statsEstimateNote: * Counts are estimated from visualized operations, not the algorithm's true execution count
visualizer.generatorPatchedVars: AI code had {{count}} undeclared variable(s) patched to 0 ({{names}}); the animation may not match the original code

codeDesync.message: Code modified — the animation and line highlights still come from the built-in demo, not your edited code

verification.failDetail: the original code is expected to return {{expected}}, but the animation produced {{actual}}. The animation may not match the real execution.
verification.passExpect: AI self-check only · not independently verified (AI-reported result)
verification.passExpectDegraded: real execution unavailable · AI self-check only, not independently verified

settings.title: AI API Configuration

settings.encryptionNote: API Key is stored locally in your browser only, never uploaded to any server

ai.title: AI-Powered Animation
